action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Billings, Arney, Clancy, DeSmidt, Goodwin, Joers, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Prado, Roe, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Spaude, Stubbs and Udell; 
cosponsored by Senators Pfaff, Dassler-Alfheim, Hesselbein, Ratcliff, Roys, Smith, Spreitzer, Wall, Wirch and Larson
